title: Improved End Rods
description: Colored end rods, Endless end rods & Broken end rods.
body:
# 🪄 Improved End Rods Bring more style to your lighting with Improved End Rods – a Minecraft mod that expands on the classic End Rod with 15 colored variants, endless end rods, and broken versions for builders who want more visual storytelling. > ⚙️ Built for NeoForge 1.21.1 > ✨ Shader Compatible PBR (LabPBR)
## ✨ Features - 🎨 Colored End RodsSupports 15 dye colors (all vanilla except white). Perfect for vibrant, themed builds. - 🌀 Endless End RodsA minimalist rod with no base. Clean and modern, ideal for sleek lighting. - 🧱 Broken End RodsCracked and shattered versions of both standard and endless rods — for ruins, decay, or ancient builds. - 🔄 Craftable & ReversibleConvert colored rods back to normal with white dye. Repair broken ones using chorus fruit.
## 🧪 Crafting Recipes ### 🔹 Colored End Rods Use dye and a regular end rod or an endless end rod. Can be reverted using white dye. ### 🔹 Endless End Rods Turn any end rod into their endless version and vice versa by putting them into the crafting grid. ### 🔹 Broken End Rods Put regular end rod or endless end rod into a blast furnace.
## Images ![Colored End Rods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/846522bdd7a32cc153a83c0e4c1dadf040ac1e3c_0.webp) ![Colored End Rods (Shaders)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dd44c49c6a0d3caf94bd74f63318753984d3bf1_0.webp) ![End Rod vs Endless End Rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd018adecbc136327e75ad9ae2461d3ab20a217a_0.webp)![Broken End Rods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/486b0c5baccf892bb3f0a9bd60a992047ae3df15_0.webp)
